plugins.name: synchestra
plugins.description: Synchestra plugin: skills, commands, and hooks that teach AI agents how to use the synchestra CLI

plugins.name: ingitdb
plugins.description: inGitDB CLI plugin: skills that teach AI agents how to use the ingitdb CLI for Git-backed database operations — validate, list, describe, CRUD, and serve.
